---
title: "Supplementary: Timings Summary"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: lumen
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext)
library(patchwork)
library(tidyr)
library(here)

analysis_dir <- here("analysis")

source(file.path(analysis_dir, "knitr.R"))
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "theme.R"))
theme_set(theme_paper(base_size = 12))
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
source(file.path(analysis_dir, "data.R"))
```

# Preliminaries

```{r prelim}
timings_summary <- metrics_new %>%
  mutate(
    n_comp = as.factor(n_comp), n_hvg = as.factor(n_hvg),
    n_neig = as.factor(n_neig)
  ) %>%
  filter(filtering == "manual") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("timings_"), names_to = "stage", values_to = "seconds"
  ) %>%
  mutate(stage = sub("^timings_", "", stage)) %>%
  group_by(dataset, method, stage) %>%
  summarize(mean_seconds = mean(seconds, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```

# Timings summary

```{r supp-timings-summary, fig.height=8, fig.width=6.69}
ggplot(timings_summary, aes(x = dataset, y = mean_seconds, fill = method)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~stage, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_method(name = "Method") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number()) +
  labs(x = "Dataset", y = "Mean seconds", fill = "Method") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
